user_query: I want to analyze the resistance and support levels of tokens 3375 and 3306, and get the current block number of the Binance Smart Chain.

TaskList.description: Fetch historical price data for tokens 3375 and 3306 from January 10th to January 11th.
Analyze the fetched historical price data to determine support and resistance levels for tokens 3375 and 3306.
Retrieve the current block number of the Binance Smart Chain.
